name: Zero Trust Network Access
strategicIntent: Enforce Zero Trust principles across all network boundaries.
problemStatement: Traditional perimeter-based security is insufficient for hybrid cloud environments.

useCases.use: Any production workload accessing corporate resources
useCases.dontUse: Isolated dev sandbox environments with no corporate data

interactionSteps: User authenticates via Azure AD with MFA
securityConsiderations: All access requests must be authenticated and authorized

guardrails.rule: MFA required for all privileged access

exceptionProcess: Submit security exception via ServiceNow with CISO approval.
diagramSvg:
<svg width="900" height="600" viewBox="0 0 900 600" font-family="system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrow" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1B3A6B"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="900" height="600" fill="#EAF1FB"/>

  <!-- Title Bar -->
  <rect width="900" height="64" fill="#1B3A6B" rx="0"/>
  <text x="32" y="28" fill="#fff" font-size="18" font-weight="700">Zero Trust Network Access</text>
  <text x="32" y="50" fill="#93c5fd" font-size="12">Security & Controls · Tier 3 — Conceptual</text>

  <!-- Strategic Intent -->
  <rect x="32" y="84" width="836" height="36" rx="8" fill="#0F6E56" opacity="0.12"/>
  <text x="450" y="107" fill="#0F6E56" font-size="12" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle">Strategic Intent: Enforce Zero Trust principles across all network boundaries</text>

  <!-- User Node -->
  <rect x="370" y="155" width="160" height="54" rx="8" fill="#fff" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="450" y="178" fill="#1B3A6B" font-size="13" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">User</text>
  <text x="450" y="196" fill="#64748b" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Initiates Auth + MFA</text>

  <!-- Arrow: User -> Azure AD -->
  <line x1="450" y1="209" x2="450" y2="268" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
  <rect x="355" y="229" width="190" height="20" rx="4" fill="#EAF1FB"/>
  <text x="450" y="243" fill="#1B3A6B" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Step 1: Authenticate w/ MFA</text>

  <!-- Azure AD Conditional Access -->
  <rect x="280" y="270" width="340" height="70" rx="8" fill="#fff" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="2"/>
  <rect x="280" y="270" width="340" height="6" rx="4" fill="#1B3A6B"/>
  <text x="450" y="303" fill="#1B3A6B" font-size="14" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">Azure AD Conditional Access</text>
  <text x="450" y="323" fill="#64748b" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Identity & Access Control</text>

  <!-- Arrow: Azure AD -> Defender -->
  <line x1="450" y1="340" x2="450" y2="399" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
  <rect x="305" y="358" width="290" height="20" rx="4" fill="#E8F5F0"/>
  <text x="450" y="372" fill="#0F6E56" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Step 2: Evaluate Device Compliance</text>

  <!-- Microsoft Defender for Cloud -->
  <rect x="280" y="401" width="340" height="70" rx="8" fill="#fff" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="2"/>
  <rect x="280" y="401" width="340" height="6" rx="4" fill="#0F6E56"/>
  <text x="450" y="434" fill="#0F6E56" font-size="14" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">Microsoft Defender for Cloud</text>
  <text x="450" y="454" fill="#64748b" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Threat Detection & Compliance</text>

  <!-- Outcome Box -->
  <rect x="310" y="500" width="280" height="50" rx="8" fill="#fff" stroke="#BA7517" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="6,3"/>
  <text x="450" y="521" fill="#BA7517" font-size="12" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">Zero Trust Policy Enforced</text>
  <text x="450" y="538" fill="#64748b" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Access granted or denied per policy</text>

  <!-- Arrow: Defender -> Outcome -->
  <line x1="450" y1="471" x2="450" y2="498" stroke="#BA7517" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>

  <!-- Legend -->
  <rect x="32" y="490" width="180" height="70" rx="8" fill="#fff" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="42" y="510" fill="#1e293b" font-size="11" font-weight="700">Legend</text>
  <line x1="42" y1="524" x2="72" y2="524" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
  <text x="78" y="528" fill="#64748b" font-size="11">Auth Flow</text>
  <line x1="42" y1="544" x2="72" y2="544" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
  <text x="78" y="548" fill="#64748b" font-size="11">Compliance Check</text>

</svg>
